boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 requires exact account match; PAY-TES-074 has a different account number; FLAG-TES-074 shows a visible flag without matching disposition.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) and visible flag leave boundary open. Clarification needed on CLR-TES-074 applicability to PAY-TES-074.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance must precede release; current sources show unresolved flag and account discrepancy.

final_answer: Payment release cannot proceed. An account number discrepancy exists between PAY-TES-074 (7205) and CLR-TES-074 (7025). Furthermore, FLAG-TES-074 shows a visible flag without a matching disposition. Clarification is required to determine if CLR-TES-074's disposition applies to PAY-TES-074. Until this is resolved, the source boundary remains open per STD-TES-074-P.
open_blockers: Visible flag without matching clearance disposition
Unclear applicability of CLR-TES-074 to PAY-TES-074
